Operation 'get_/suffixes/{suffix}' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation has no summary or description. Added context about what suffixes are in TCG domain, what the operation retrieves, expected input (suffix identifier), and return value to enable AI agents to understand when to use this filter operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve card suffix details by identifier
data.description_suggestion: Fetches detailed information about a specific card suffix (e.g., 'a', 'b', 'c') used to distinguish multiple printings or variants of the same card. Returns the suffix object containing its identifier and associated metadata. Useful for filtering or identifying card variants in the Pokémon TCG database.
data.reasoning: Operation has no summary or description. Added context about what suffixes are in TCG domain, what the operation retrieves, expected input (suffix identifier), and return value to enable AI agents to understand when to use this filter operation.

message: Operation 'get_/trainer-types' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation lacks summary and description entirely. Added clarity about what trainer types are in TCG context, that it returns a list/array, and the use case for filtering cards by trainer type to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: List all available Pokémon TCG trainer types
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a complete list of all trainer card types available in the Pokémon Trading Card Game database. Returns an array of trainer type objects, each containing the type identifier and metadata. Use this endpoint to discover available trainer type filters for card queries.
data.reasoning: Operation lacks summary and description entirely. Added clarity about what trainer types are in TCG context, that it returns a list/array, and the use case for filtering cards by trainer type to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'get_/trainer-types/{trainer-type}' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability.
